categories.name: Coding Agents
categories.description: AI-powered tools that write, review, and debug code directly in your development workflow.

categories.name: Research Agents
categories.description: AI agents specialized in finding, synthesizing, and analyzing information from various sources.

categories.name: General / Personal Agents
categories.description: Versatile AI assistants for everyday tasks including writing, analysis, brainstorming, and conversation.

categories.name: Creative Agents
categories.description: AI tools for generating images, music, video, and other creative media.

categories.name: Frameworks & Platforms
categories.description: Developer tools and SDKs for building custom AI agents and multi-agent workflows.

agents.name: Claude Code
agents.description: An agentic CLI tool that lets Claude operate directly in your terminal, reading files, editing code, running commands, and managing git workflows autonomously.

agents.name: Cursor
agents.description: An AI-native code editor built on VS Code that provides inline code generation, multi-file editing, and codebase-aware chat powered by multiple foundation models.

agents.name: GitHub Copilot
agents.description: An AI pair programmer integrated into popular editors that suggests code completions, generates functions from comments, and offers chat-based coding assistance.

agents.name: Windsurf
agents.description: An AI-powered IDE that combines copilot and agent capabilities, allowing flows where the AI and developer collaborate on code changes across an entire project.

agents.name: Perplexity
agents.description: An AI-powered answer engine that searches the web in real time, synthesizes information from multiple sources, and provides cited responses to complex questions.

agents.name: Elicit
agents.description: A research assistant that helps find and analyze academic papers, extract key claims, and summarize findings across large bodies of scientific literature.

agents.name: Consensus
agents.description: A search engine that uses AI to find and synthesize results from peer-reviewed scientific research, providing evidence-based answers with citations.

agents.name: ChatGPT
agents.description: A general-purpose AI assistant that can handle conversation, writing, coding, analysis, and web browsing, with plugin and custom GPT support for specialized tasks.
agents.pricing: Free tier, Plus $20/mo, Team $25/mo, Enterprise custom

agents.name: Gemini
agents.description: Google's multimodal AI assistant with deep integration into Google Workspace, Search, and Android, capable of handling text, images, code, and long documents.
agents.pricing: Free tier, Advanced $19.99/mo (included with Google One AI Premium)

agents.name: Claude
agents.description: A helpful AI assistant known for nuanced instruction-following, long-context understanding, and careful reasoning across writing, analysis, coding, and research tasks.
agents.pricing: Free tier, Pro $20/mo, Team $25/mo, Enterprise custom

agents.name: Midjourney
agents.description: A leading AI image generation tool that creates high-quality, artistic images from text prompts, known for its distinctive aesthetic style and photorealistic output.

agents.name: DALL-E 3
agents.description: OpenAI's image generation model integrated into ChatGPT and available via API, offering precise prompt adherence and the ability to render text within images.
agents.pricing: Included with ChatGPT Plus, API usage-based

agents.name: Suno
agents.description: An AI music generation platform that creates full songs with vocals, instruments, and lyrics from text prompts or custom lyrics input.

agents.name: LangChain
agents.description: An open-source framework for building LLM-powered applications with chains, agents, retrieval-augmented generation, and memory, supporting multiple model providers.
agents.pricing: Open source (LangSmith platform has paid tiers)

agents.name: CrewAI
agents.description: A framework for orchestrating role-playing AI agents that collaborate on complex tasks, allowing developers to define agent roles, goals, and delegation patterns.
agents.pricing: Open source, Enterprise cloud plans available

agents.name: AutoGen
agents.description: An open-source framework for building multi-agent conversational systems where multiple AI agents can collaborate, debate, and coordinate to solve tasks.

agents.name: OpenAI Assistants API
agents.description: A platform API for building AI assistants with persistent threads, file retrieval, code interpretation, and function calling built into OpenAI's hosted infrastructure.

agents.name: Model Context Protocol (MCP)
agents.description: An open protocol that standardizes how AI applications connect to external data sources and tools, enabling plug-and-play integrations for any MCP-compatible client.
